name: Breakfast Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 13x9-inch baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Stir in dried fruit.
4. Beat egg and sugar on high speed for 1 minute.
5. Stir in applesauce.
6. Alternately beat in flour and buttermilk powder.
7. Stir in Cheerios until combined.
8. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
9. Sprinkle remaining Cheerios on top.
10. Bake for 15 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Cool on a wire rack.
Nutrition per serving: 119 calories. 2 grams protein; 1 gram fat; 26 grams carbohydrate; 96 milligrams sodium; 14 milligrams cholesterol.
